brand_logo_emoji: mobile fleet repair,commercial vehicles,DOT inspection,home-based,low overhead,B2B,no mechanical background,scalable,automotive
tagline: Mobile B2B fleet repair franchise with home-based operations low overhead and no mechanical background required
description_short: DuraFleet is a home-based mobile fleet maintenance franchise serving commercial vehicles of all sizes from cargo vans to heavy-duty trucks. Owners manage technicians rather than performing repairs making it viable for executives and corporate professionals without mechanical backgrounds. With investment starting at $108K and affiliate data showing over $1M in annual gross revenue the brand targets growing commercial fleet outsourcing demand across an 8.7% CAGR market.
market_intelligence_insight: Global mobile fleet maintenance market valued at $7.2B in 2024 projected to reach $15.8B by 2033 at 8.7% CAGR with North America at 38% of global share and mobile repair the fastest-growing segment driven by e-commerce growth aging commercial fleets and outsourced maintenance demand
item_19_headline: Affiliate outlet across approximately 2.5 territories reported $1.03M gross revenue with 41.6% EBITDA margin in 2023; single-territory figures not separately disclosed
